title: Samut Sakhon Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Samut Sakhon with a Z-Score of +3.83. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Samut Sakhon is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 70%, and the wind speed is moderate at 13.0 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, exacerbating the heat wave's impact on the city.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's effects immediately.
